title: swertia albicaulis f. alba
intro: Swertia albicaulis f. alba, also known as the White Alpine Swertia or White Swertia, is a type of flowering plant in the gentian family that is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Swertia albicaulis f. alba include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to make herbal preparations for medicinal purposes.
